admission_overview.college_name: ICRI Gurgaon Admission: Process, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: Established in 2008,Institution of Clinical Research of India- Ansal University(also known asICRI-Ansal University) is one of the first private Clinical Research institutes of India. The Institute offers industry-oriented programmes with unique academic curriculum, prepared by industry experts and academic collaborations across India. In Delhi NCR, ICRI extends a strong-tie up and affiliation withAnsal University, Gurugramto offer skill-oriented courses in the stream of Clinical Research & Healthcare, Aviation Management, Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence, Logistics and Supply Chain Management. ICRI’s collaboration with Ansal University has proven well for aspirants who look for a state-of-art campus with industry-oriented curriculum and100% placementassurance as well.

All the programmes offered under the stream of Logistics and Aviation Management by ICRI Ansal University are affiliated and approved by theInstitute of Logistics and Aviation Management of India (ILAM). The aim of the programmes offered at ICRI (Ansal University) is to provide skilled professionals for the upcoming generation. With more than 2,000 industry partners, ICRI (Ansal University), additionally, offers compulsory internships for all of its students. Courses offered in the institute ensure that aspirants gain additional skills, competitive edge in this complex job market.

Institution of Clinical Research of India Ansal University admission process 2020 is conducted in online mode only. Admission process for UG and PG programmes involve a Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) conducted by ICRI. For all Aviation Management programmes at UG and PG level, GD and PI are conducted and managed by ILAM, New Delhi.

Institution of Clinical Research of India Ansal University offers BTech in Computer Science Engineering with two sub-specialisations, BBA in two specialisations and BSc (Clinical Research & Healthcare Management) at UG level.

ICRI Ansal University offers BTech in Computer Science Engineering with two sub-specialisations, namely Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning. Other than this, the institute offers BSc in Clinical Research and Healthcare Management and BBA in two specialisations, namely Aviation Management and Logistics & Supply Chain Management at UG level. The course duration of BTech is four years, whereas the duration of BBA and BSc is three years.

Selection criteria:Admission to BTech is based on an entrance exam, GD and PI counducted by ICRI. Admission to BBA is based on GD and PI conducted by ILAM, whereas BSc admission is based on GD and PI conducted by ICRI.

Institution of Clinical Research of India Ansal University offers MBA in three specialisations, namely Aviation, Logistics & Supply Chain and Healthcare, and MSc in Clinical Research at PG level.

ICRI Ansal University MBA admission is based on GD and PI conducted by ILAM, New Delhi. However, admission to MSc is based on the cumulative score obtained in GD and PI conducted by ICRI authorities. The course duration of MSc and MBA is two years.

For ICRI Ansal University application process 2023, candidates must submit the application in online mode only. An application fee of Rs 1,000 is to be submitted along with all the necessary documents online. Mentioned below is the step-by-step process of application:
Step 1:Visit the official website of ICRI at https://www.icriindia.com
Step 2:Choose the campus, college and course to apply
Step 4:Fill in all the relevant details and submit the application
Step 5:Submit the application fee via net-banking/credit card/debit card
Step 6:Once the application form is submitted, candidates are sent an acknowledgement mail with detailed schedule on for GD and PI round
Step 7:Based on performance, short-listed candidates are called for admission
Step 8:Make the payment of fees to confirm the seat

faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.

review_content.Placements: This college does not provide placements. However, during your internship period, you get to work in the college hospital itself, which trains and guides you for your future work and dealing with patients, as well as treating different types of diseases and having one-on-one conversations with patients. Dealing with all the surgeries which are allowed under the government ACT of allowed ayurvedic surgeries such as the surgery for appendix and other ENT surgeries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not very nice despite its auditorium, which is newly built and is really beautiful. It reminds us of a movie theatre where functions of the college, as well as seminars, are conducted at regular intervals. The girls' hostel is another new building in the college, which is also nicely built with 30 rooms, out of which 28 are double-seater and 2 are triple-seater rooms with attached washrooms in every room and cupboards are also there, plus a common room and a mess too. Labs are quite big, and the pharmacy has all the ancient equipment which was used to prepare medicine in the older times. New machines are also there for pharmacy uses. The library is also very well managed with a lot of course books available for students.

individual_reviews.title: Rajiv Academy for Pharmacy is a very good college.

content.Placements: In our college, many students take admission from the local region, different cities and states. The placement packages are high. The highest package offered is 20 LPA to 40 LPA. Lupin, Cipla, Mankind, and Ranbaxy are top recruiting companies for our course. About 70-80% of students get internships in companies like Lupin, Alcohn, Mankind etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a great infrastructure and interior with air-conditioned rooms, labs, and a library. They also provide free Wi-Fi to students and faculty. The hostel food is tasty. They offer great and fresh food to us, and students love it.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Uttar Pradesh for Pharmacy courses.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students or above got placed. Top recruitment was by Sun Pharma, Alembic Pharma, GSK, etc. Drug Inspector, Sales Manager, Safety Supervisor. The highest salary package offered is 72 LPA. Most of the Drug Inspectors in Mathura had passed out from this college.
content.Infrastructure: The library is pretty good, and labs are situated with equipment. The hostel is just near the campus, with good infrastructure, a quiet place, and the canteen is good and big. There are 2-basketball and badminton courts. There is a medical store on the campus, and stationery is also on the campus.

content.Infrastructure: Labs of our course are properly conducted daily. The library is regularly updated with new amendments and new books. Classrooms are good with the proper furniture.
